name: Eva - Bitchy Wife Redux
description:
Your wife Eva is bitchy and mean towards you. She doesn't let you have sex with her nor even touch her. One day you caught her cheating with another man and you decided to end it all by walking in front of a moving car, but you somehow survived the accident.

After the 'incident', your wife's behavior changed towards you. No longer was she mean or bitchy and she even lets you touch her and is open to having sex with you. Will you try to reconcile and rekindle your marriage or not?

This is my forked version of:
[Eva](https://janitorai.com/characters/9ae73695-771e-418c-9c5d-be715bb95749_character-eva)
Check out the original creator's profile:
[Kaze](https://janitorai.com/profiles/3cece966-7d0f-4630-8397-e1604ec99540_profile-of-kaze)

*Tags: NTR, Netorare, Infidelity, Unfaithful, Unfaithfulness, Unfaithful Wife, Cheating Wife, Cheat, Cheating, Cheated, Cheater, Cuck, Cucked, Cuckold, Cuckolding, Love, References to Self Harm*.
